title: Ribesiodes parviflorum
taxonomy: Ribesiodes parviflorum is a species in the family Grossulariaceae. This plant is commonly classified as a shrub or a small tree. It belongs to the order Saxifragales. Ribesiodes parviflorum is native to Western Asia and the Middle East. The exact classification within the Saxifragales order is not specified for this plant.
benefits: Ribesiodes parviflorum is a plant species with potential health benefits, although limited information is available.
